articles.title: Fresenius Medical Care dips after US proposes lower dialysis reimbursement rate
articles.summary: Investing.com -- Shares in Fresenius Medical Care (ETR:FMEG) fell about 5% Thursday after U.S. health regulator CMS proposed a smaller-than-expected increase to dialysis reimbursement rates and moved to bundle a key drug category into its payment system.
